prestazioni: Engine swap to a 1UZ-FE V8 (4.0L, 32-valve, quad-cam) with a custom bellhousing adapter for the R151 transmission, utilizing a HKS 264° camshaft kit and Tomei 1.3mm head gaskets for 11.5:1 compression. Paired with a Garrett GT35R turbo (0.82 A/R turbine housing) on a custom stainless manifold by Trust/GReddy, feeding into a HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve and a custom 3.5" intercooler piping setup with a GReddy Type-S intercooler core.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: TRD 80-series Land Cruiser 4.88:1 ring & pinion swap into the C50 5-speed transmission, coupled with a Cusco 2-way LSD and a custom driveshaft from Driveshaft Shop (3.5" chromoly, balanced for 8,000 RPM). Clutch upgrade to a Spec Stage 4+ twin-disc setup with a billet flywheel, mated to a Tilton hydraulic throwout bearing.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (custom valving for the U10 chassis), polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0114K for front control arms), and a Cusco front strut tower bar (part #601 540 A). Braking system upgraded to Endless CC-R6 rotors (280mm front, 260mm rear) with Brembo 4-piston calipers (from a JZA80 Supra) and custom stainless lines by Goodridge.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny widebody conversion (PB-002 kit for U10 chassis) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, reinforced with Cusco chassis stiffeners (part #602 540 A). Front bumper replaced with a custom 3D-printed ABS unit featuring integrated DRLs from LUX H8 V2 and a Seibon carbon fiber hood with a functional vent for the intercooler.

Rear wing swap to a Voltex Type-7 (2000mm width, 300mm height) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals, paired with a custom rear diffuser from Varis (carbon fiber, 3-piece design with integrated LED brake light). Side skirts replaced with custom aluminum units from Garage Vary, featuring integrated air curtains for brake cooling.

Interior stripped and reinforced with a full Cusco bolt-in roll cage (part #604 540 A, 8-point, chromoly), Recaro SRD seats (JDM-spec, recliners removed), and a custom aluminum dashboard with a Motec C127 dash display. Shift knob replaced with a custom titanium unit from 3R Racing, paired with a NRG quick-release steering wheel hub and a Momo Prototipo wheel (350mm, suede).
